title: List of Regulatory Agencies for the Purposes of Subsection 68.11(4) of the Medical Devices Regulations - Canada.ca
content:
## List of Regulatory Agencies for the Purposes of Subsection 68.11(4) of the Medical Devices Regulations
Date issued: January 3, 2024
Supersedes: February 22, 2023
Access the archived versions of this list.
This list is incorporated by reference in paragraph 68.11(4)(b) of the Medical Devices Regulations . The list sets out the regulatory agencies for the purposes of subsection 68.11(4).
Health Canada maintains and updates this list as required.
For more information, please refer to:
- Medical devices for an urgent public health need
